meta.description: An identifiable single public infrastructure issue or works project. Includes potholes, street lighting issues, paving, public transport problems, sinkholes, public-road works, and works on the water/sewer system (pipe breaks, leaks, sewer collapses, repair projects). Each issue is a specific occurrence distinguishable by its location and date — a discrete physical work or single incident. Broader civic events around infrastructure (complaint waves, policy announcements, planning decisions, general water-supply issues like shortages or service-quality complaints) belong to the public_infrastructure_event schema (event_type='water_issue', etc.), not this one. Extracted from news articles and social media.

example.description: Large pothole on Blvd. Adolfo Lopez Mateos causing traffic problems and vehicle damage.
example.context: Neighbors have reported the issue multiple times. Municipal authorities say repairs are scheduled for next week.
example.affected_area: tramo entre Blvd. Torres Landa y Blvd. Hidalgo

event_type.description: Type of public works issue from the catalogue. Choose the single most specific category that matches.

event_subtype.description: More specific subtype, e.g. 'road_damage', 'water_pipe_break', 'bus_route_change', 'bridge_repair', 'sewer_collapse', 'trash_odor', 'illegal_dumping', 'water_pipe_replacement', 'water_leak_repair', 'sewage_overflow_works', 'road_sinkhole'. For specific water-system works (pipe breaks, leaks, sewer collapses, sewage overflows that prompt repair) use this schema; for general water-supply or water-management issues (shortages, illegal extraction, service-quality complaints) use the public_infrastructure_event schema with event_type='water_issue'.

status.description: Current status of the issue or works project.

name.description: Name of the project if it has one, e.g. 'Rehabilitacion del Blvd. Torres Landa'.

description.description: Brief description of the issue or project.

context.description: Contextual information: citizen complaints, political context, related projects.

relevance.description: Relevance within the article: 1 = main topic, 2 = secondary, 3 = implicit.

date_range.description: Date or date range when the issue was reported or the works started/are scheduled. Extract the start datetime and, if present, the end datetime.

location.description: Location of the infrastructure issue or works project.

responsible_authority.description: Government agency or authority responsible for the issue or project.

affected_area.description: Description of the affected area or stretch, e.g. 'tramo entre Blvd. A y Blvd. B'.

estimated_cost.description: Estimated cost of works or repairs, with original mention, numeric bounds, and currency.

completion_date.description: Expected completion date for the works project, if mentioned.

impact_description.description: Description of the impact on traffic, services, or citizens.
